description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named conda_build that runs on push to tags v* and branch master, and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrent builds with cancel-in-progress set to true. Set up two ubuntu-latest jobs: one for testing with Conda libsecp256k1 and another for building Linux wheels. The test job checks style and typing, runs tests and benchmarks with tox, while the wheel job builds sdist and wheel, and tests the wheel in a clean environment.
